root_cause: CVR declined −0.18pp (3.07%→2.89%, −0.32pp structural). S2C fell −1.45pp on MB · Paid · Google Ads (69% Shapley share), concentrated on Desktop visitors browsing dominant TGID 23604 (Eiffel Tower Guided Tour). Upstream signals (supply, pricing, catalogue) all healthy — mechanism is a Desktop select-page abandonment pattern not yet explained by available data.
